{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317143550EE57B46ABC589C2AE0"}"},"total":362},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7453491264799687449","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"迟来的评价，书的内容和剧情还是很不错的！尤其是从林七夜在经历一些困难的时候，祁厌的介入，一点点的帮助林七夜，很丝滑的两人感情纠缠，以及后续的在一起，很流畅！！！emmm，某三九感情学起来好吧！！！！！
还有就是，有一点雷林七夜和祁厌两人发生酿酿酱酱的时间，感觉太早了，前期感觉亲亲抱抱举高高完全足够，后期到夜幕小队的时候在酿酿酱酱感觉会更好一些。
不过，我个人感觉无伤大雅，整体都还可以的！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735408222,"group_id":"7446788573497412633","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个努力存稿，却永远都存不下稿子的懒癌晚期患者～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8O3ieEav02wyVP0qTfN2Ce9aFWvK+SCUkQg7G1qtEkI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29a12b534e914cf2abf2540231963d3a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791539&x-signature=XznWrBPgD%2BEokYZl0CDqSvgxxUM%3D","user_id":"3037300598534443","user_name":"一条锦鲤吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3037300598534443","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7446788573497412633","book_info":{"abstract":"【女频，标错了  双男  七夜主 无逻辑  cp林七夜  尘鱼cp 文笔稚嫩 不喜勿喷】

“这个世界的真相是什么?我看不清……”
“或许早已真相大白，那立于万万人前的他们……”
大夏怎可无神明?且看!神明禁行!
“如果我有改变结局的能力，必当奋不顾身!”
“你的身后，不是没有人……”
